mapper.delete: DELETE ui,u FROM user_info ui LEFT JOIN user u ON ui.user_id = u.id WHERE ui.id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT ui.id,ui.user_id,ui.name,ui.phone,ui.gender,u.username FROM user_info ui LEFT JOIN user u on ui.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON ui.user_id = ur.user_id WHERE
ur.role_id = #{roleId} AND
ui.name LIKE CONCAT('',#{name},'') AND
1 = 1
